event: Allegorical Composition with Flowers and Figure
description: A small, vibrantly colored composition within a gilded ornamental frame. On the left, a partially nude female figure with pink skin stands amid swirling purple and colored forms. Large blue flowers with golden centers dominate the right portion. Decorative blue scrollwork and ornamental elements fill the right edge. The overall effect is fantastical and decorative, with rich saturated colors.
